title: RBI (Commercial Banks — Credit Cards and Debit Cards: Issuance and Conduct) – Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI mandates that penal charges apply only after a three-day delay and only on outstanding dues. The ruling protects customers from excessive penalties and ensures fair billing practices.
The post RBI (Commercial Banks — Credit Cards and Debit Cards: Issuance and Conduct) – Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
